front: Artist: French painter known for expressive self-portraits with unusual poses (yawning, pointing at the viewer)
Artist: self-portrait pointing at the viewer became an Internet meme
Artist: painted a portrait of Marie Antoinette before her marriage
Artist: claimed to be the only student of Maurice-Quentin de La Tour, the Rococo pastel portraitist of Rousseau and Voltaire
Artist: just before dying, made a chalk portrait of a Black man who may be Toussaint Louverture
